items.title: Welcome
items.content:
Welcome [FirstName]! We hope you have a memorable Blue Ridge experience.
To help you enjoy a seamless getaway, we’ve packed this guide with everything you need to know about the property and our rental guidelines.
Don't forget to check out our Area Guide as well! It’s full of our favorite local recommendations to help you make the most of your time in Blue Ridge.
We are here if you need us! Call or text us at 706-525-5482.

items.title: Address
items.content: [PropertyId] is located at: [PropertyAddress].

items.title: Check-In
items.content: Check-in is at 3:30 pm. We ask that you respect this time frame which allows our cleaners to have the house ready for you. Unless you have an approved early check-in, your Door Code will be texted to you at 3:15, along with the WiFi Password.

items.title: Request Early Check-In
items.content:
An early check-in may be available! Our early check-in service is $50 per hour (excluding tax + processing) up to 2 hours prior to 3:30pm. Send a request below and we will let you know if we can accommodate your early arrival.
[EarlyCheckIn]

items.title: Request Late Check-Out
items.content:
We may be able to offer you a late checkout. This service is $50 per hour (excluding tax + processing) up to 2 hours after 10am. Click the button below to send us the request, and we will let you know if we can accommodate it!
[LateCheckOut]

items.title: Door Code
items.content: Unless you have an approved early check-in, the door code will be texted to you on day of arrival at 3:15 pm, along with the WiFi password.

items.title: Parking
items.content:
There is parking for 4-5 cars
Parking on the right of way of any road or street overnight is prohibited.

items.title: WiFi
items.content:
Your Wifi Password: [WifiSecurityKey]
The WiFi information will also be texted to you along with the Door Code so that you have both very handy! If you have any problems, please text us.

items.title: Not Pet Friendly
items.content: This home does not allow pets due to the homeowners' request.

items.title: Pet Information
items.content:
Pet Friendly
All pets must be approved by management. Because a home is deemed pet friendly does not mean that pets are allowed without prior approval and appropriate fees. Some of our homes have certain pet restrictions according to breed, age, etc.
Unfortunately we hate to do this, but if a pet is discovered the pet fees, pet deposit, and pet cleaning fee will be doubled.
If your pet has been approved, please follow the rules regarding your pet.
Pet Information.pdf

items.title: Grocery Stores
items.content:
Know where the Grocery Stores are before heading to your cabin ~ for liquor stores, stop in Ellijay. Blue Ridge grocery stores carry beer and wine only.
Walmart - as you come into Blue Ridge, at the big intersection (McDonalds), turn LEFT. At next light turn LEFT. Walmart is to the RIGHT.
Ingles - as you come into Blue Ridge, stay on Hwy 515. At the Orvin Lance Connecter intersection where you see CVS and South Bank to your right and Taco Bell on your left, you will turn LEFT. Past the Taco Bell, turn RIGHT into Ingles parking lot.
Food Lion - Turn RIGHT at the Conoco gas station. At the three-way stop sign, turn LEFT and then LEFT again into Food Lion parking lot.

items.title: Rebook Direct and Save
items.content: We love our repeat guests and can't wait for your return! Use your Loyalty Reward Points to save! Must be applied at time of booking to a new reservation made over the phone.
